title: andrographis lawsonii
intro: Andrographis lawsonii, also known as the Himalayan andrographis, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exerting antioxidant effects. Andrographis lawsonii is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
